title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
